Pan Miao з•ӘиӢ—
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pan Miao (з•ӘиӢ—)was born in Jiuzhen. Killed Dan Meng following his brotherвҖҷs death. Pan Miao was affiliated with Shi Xie.
